jsonLd.title: Senior Frontend Developer at Lybrate
jsonLd.description:
Lybrate invites applications from qualified candidates for the position of Frontend Developer at our Ranchi location. This role offers excellent career advancement prospects.

About Lybrate:
Lybrate is a leading organization in the Remote sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Troubleshoot, debug, and resolve software defects and performance issues
• Participate in on-call rotation for production support
• Collaborate with cross-functional teams including product, design, and QA
• Mentor junior developers and conduct knowledge-sharing sessions
• Contribute to system architecture and technical design decisions
• Write and execute unit tests and integration tests
• Participate in code reviews and contribute to technical discussions

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• B.Tech / B.E. in Computer Science or related discipline
• 12-20 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Git
• Proficiency in Docker
• Proficiency in Rust
• Proficiency in Python
• Proficiency in Agile/Scrum
• Proficiency in TypeScript
• Proficiency in TensorFlow
• Proficiency in JavaScript

Work Mode: Remote - Work from anywhere in India

What We Offer:
• International travel opportunities for senior roles
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Flexible working hours
• Learning & development budget
• Maternity and paternity leave
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Salary Range: 35 LPA - 70 LPA per annum

Location: Ranchi, Jharkhand, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Lybrate!
